2387690.name: ARKOS 2 Demo
2387690.description:
Arkos 2 is a first-person fantasy shooter with destructible voxel environment. You play the old wizard Arkos, who has to save the land of the twilight
Game inspired by the classic old first person shooters of the 90s like Heretic, Hexen and Catacomb3D, but powered with some bloody Voxels!

The ancient evil is back!

Next Generation of Voxel Engine with Destructible voxel environment
Five Episodes with a Boss Battles
Classic style MIDI Soundtrack
3 Difficulty Modes
5 Unique Weapons
Pure retro action with some puzzle elements

Demo has 3 levels from full game!
